interaction_phrase: developed together with Intel's research collaborators at
occurrence_sentence: Developed together with Intel's research collaborators at QuTech, a partnership between TU Delft and TNO (Netherlands Organization for Applied Scientific Research), Horse Ridge is fabricated using Intel's 22nm FinFET technology.

occurrence_sentence: Developed together with Intel's research collaborators at QuTech, a partnership between TU Delft and TNO (Netherlands Organization for Applied Scientific Research), Horse Ridge is fabricated using Intel's 22nm FinFET technology.

This will enable the company to leverage its expertise in advanced packaging and interconnect technologies to create a solution with the qubits and controls in one streamlined package. — From [Intel's newsroom](https://newsroom.intel.com/news/intel-introduces-horse-ridge-enable-commercially-viable-quantum-computers/)
